_layout: Documentation of grass.png tile organization. Adjust grass_shoreline mapping to match your tile visuals. N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8 for water adjacency bitmask.
_rules: Grass tile cannot be placed on top of water (~ or `).
Hills (I) are placed only on grass tiles (G).
Ocean (continent mode): min 2 tiles wide. Outermost = deep (`), inner = shallow (~). Same as lake: interior water (4 neighbors) -> deep; min 1-tile shallow next to land/B.
B = continent shoreline: grass adjacent to ocean shallow water. Water connected via NESW to the 2-tile ocean border.
L = lake shoreline: inland water (not connected to ocean). Grass adjacent to lakes/ponds.
Lake outline (L) tiles need at least 2 NESW sides touching another lake tile (water or L) to avoid diagonals.
Lake deep water (`): only in lakes (not ocean). Min 1-tile shallow border around deep water. Lake shorelines (L) cannot be placed on deep water tiles.
R = river bank: rivers that do NOT connect to the ocean. Rivers with ocean outlet use B.
Shoreline = 1 tile border around continent perimeter. No grass (G), trees (T/F), hills (I), dirt (P), etc. on shoreline. Connected via NESW (no diagonal-only links).
Trees cannot be placed on B/L/R.
Join (J) and POI (S, M, H, C, D, N) cannot be placed on B/L/R.
Dirt (P) must be at least 1 tile away from shoreline (B/L/R).
Shoreline: shoreline_path (shorelines.aseprite) uses shoreline.shoreline_map for bitmask->tile. Override shoreline_map to match your sheet layout.

grass.description: Tiles 1-13: grass. 1 = default, 2-13 = variations. default_weight > 0.5 ensures tile 1 uses >50% of interior grass.

hill_map._comment: Cardinals 1,2,4,8 = peninsula ends N→12,E→11,S→10,W→13. Mask 15 = 4-way connector (tile 14); plateau interior is grass in painter, not this tile.
hill_map._mask5_note: Vertical ridge (mask 5): second pass picks left cliff 9 vs right cliff 7 from N/S neighbor tile ids; default spine tile is this value.
hill_map._mask10_note: Horizontal ridge default spine (E–W); second pass: tile 6 if W=2 or W mask-10 continuation and E=3 or E mask-10 continuation; tile 8 if W=4 / E=5 with same rules; ambiguous spine middle stays default (8).

diagonal_inset_2x2._comment: Optional 2×2 art grid (tl,tr,bl,br) for concave diagonal insets. null = grass; int = hill tile id. Outer corners usually 2–5; inset corners 34–37. Consumed by paint_map_to_png.

hill._diagonal_inset_swap_sw_ne: When true (default), SW geometry uses diagonal_inset_2x2.ne and NE uses .sw. Set false if your sheet keys match engine geometry.
hill._diagonal_inset_swap_nw_se: When true (default), NW geometry uses diagonal_inset_2x2.se and SE uses .nw.
hill._diagonal_inset_ne_overrides: NE 2×2 TL/BR conditional tiles; see terrain.bitmask.json hill._diagonal_inset_ne_overrides.
hill._diagonal_inset_sw_overrides: SW 2×2 TL/BR conditional tiles; see terrain.bitmask.json hill._diagonal_inset_sw_overrides.
hill._diagonal_inset_se_overrides: SE 2×2 TR/BL conditional tiles; see terrain.bitmask.json hill._diagonal_inset_se_overrides.
hill._diagonal_inset_nw_overrides: NW 2×2 TR/BL conditional tiles; see terrain.bitmask.json hill._diagonal_inset_nw_overrides.
hill._diagonal_bridge: Optional. Set diagonal_bridge: true to paste 2x2 hill corners on ASCII grass where hills only meet diagonally. Default false so grass (G/.) stays grass-only in the PNG.
hill._cardinal_connects: Bits 1,2,4,8 → peninsula tiles 12,11,10,13 (N,E,S,W). Ridges: mask 5→9 (default spine), 10→8. Three-open: 7→28, 11→32, 13→30, 14→26.
hill._interior_protrusion: When mask 15 (all NESW hill), second pass: if N+W base tiles ∈ {8,12,13,23,24}→15; N+E ∈ {8,11,12,23,24}→16; S+W ∈ {8,10,13,23,24}→17; S+E ∈ {8,10,11,23,24}→18; else mesa tile from hill_map[15].
hill._diagonal_inference: Like lake shoreline: cardinal-only masks 1,2,4,8 upgrade to corner masks 3,6,9,12 when the matching diagonal is hill (see _hill_mask_with_diagonal_inference in paint_map_png.py).
hill._three_sides: Masks 7/11/13/14 use resolve_hill_autotile_tile_id (not single cardinal strips).
hill._diagonal_combo: Connect diagonal hills via NESW. Dark blue: NW gap (E+S hills) tile 2, SE gap (N+W hills) tile 5. Light blue: NE gap (W+S hills) tile 3, SW gap (N+E hills) tile 4.
hill._sheet_art_notes: Human-only: inset-style tiles on the hill sheet (28/29/31/32/36/37). Concave grass-notch insets: NW 34, NE 35, SW 36, SE 37 (see diagonal_inset_2x2).
hill._layout: 1=isolated; 2–5=corners; 6–9=edges; 10=vert ridge; 11=horiz ridge; 14=mesa; 15–27=protrusion set; 28+ junctions; 34–37 concave inset corners; 38 spare/alternate

lake.description: When lakesrivers_path is set: tiles 1-9 in lakesrivers.aseprite. lake_map maps bitmask 0-15 to 1-based tile index. special_tiles: south_of_n_edge (49), deep_n_shallow_ew_land_s (6 for ~ with N=deep,E=~,S=land,W=~). interior_lake_tiles [49,50,51,52] for L cells in interior clusters.
lake._interior_cases: 1: NESW all water (L/R/~/`) -> blank. 2: N(tile3)+W(tile3)->49. 3: S(tile2)+W(tile2)->51. 4: N(tile5)+E(tile5)->50. 5: E(tile4)+S(tile4)->52. 6: 3+ lake neighbors + shallow water neighbor -> blank. tile2=mask3, tile3=mask6, tile4=mask9, tile5=mask12.

lake_map._comment: N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8. Derived from lake_shoreline (51-59) minus 50 for lakesrivers.aseprite 1-9.

river.description: When lakesrivers_path is set: tiles 10-11. Masks 5=N+S (vertical), 10=E+W (horizontal).

shoreline.description: shoreline_path (shorelines.aseprite) is used for continent shoreline when set. Tiles 1-35. shoreline_map maps bitmask 0-15 to 1-based tile index. Match range to your sheet tile count.

grass_shoreline._comment: Bitmask N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8. When using grass.png for shoreline (no shoreline_path): tile indices 98-118. When shoreline_path set: use shoreline.shoreline_map instead.
